text: At {last_close} the stock sits {discount_bid2}% below Danone's withdrawn ${bid2} bid, with {two_bloc}% of the register in two strategic blocs ({family_pct}% family + {danone_now}% Danone, est.) heading into the {meeting_date} vote — now {days_to_meeting} days out.
Discount to the $27 anchor: {discount_bid2}% — a credible re-bid closes it; flag re-widening past 20%.
Days to the annual meeting: {days_to_meeting} — the control swing factor.

Danone walked on {withdraw_date} but kept {danone_pct}% plus a cooperation agreement; the poison pill lapses {pill_date} ({days_to_pill} days), reopening a creeping-control / re-bid window over a business the market frames near ${val_base} stand-alone.
Days to pill expiry: {days_to_pill} — flag any 13D/A filing before it lapses.
Stand-alone vs re-bid frame: ${val_base} / ${val_rebid} — the spread the setup is pricing.

The tape is decoupling from the lost bid: across {events_total} tracked corporate events the most recent ({last_event_date}) moved the stock {last_event_pct}%, and the press log holds {news_total} articles.
Tracked corporate events: {events_total} — watch for a 13D/A or a re-bid 8-K next.
Class III milk at ${milk_latest}/cwt ({milk_month}) is running {milk_yoy}% YoY; lower raw milk drops straight to gross margin, already at {gm_latest}%.
Class III $/cwt: ${milk_latest} ({milk_yoy}% YoY) — flag a sustained move above ${milk_flag} as a margin headwind.
Lifeway holds {lway_sov_pct}% of cultured-dairy mentions in the tracked window; brand and category buzz move together, consistent with the {qrev_latest}% Q1 sales print.
Lifeway share of voice: {lway_sov_pct}% — flag a sustained drop below {sov_flag}% vs Chobani/Fage.
Q1 2026 grew {qrev_latest}% — a {cat_gap}-pt share-gain gap over the ~{cat_latest}% kefir category — with gross margin {gm_latest}% climbing toward the {gm_band_low}–{gm_band_high}% FY27E band.
Gross margin vs FY27E band: {gm_latest}% vs {gm_band_low}–{gm_band_high}% — flag a quarter that stalls below {gm_flag}%.
Share-gain gap (LWAY − category): {cat_gap} pts — flag compression toward 0.
Smoothed social demand and the indexed share price show a {demand_corr} correlation over the tracked window — social interest broadly tracks the tape rather than leading it.
Demand–price correlation: {demand_corr} — flag a sign flip (demand rising while price falls = a divergence worth a look).

Two strategic blocs hold {coalition_pct}% if aligned — still {coalition_gap} pts shy of the Illinois ⅔ ({supermajority}%) bar. Danone has trimmed toward ~{danone_now}% post-secondary, and the standstill lapses in {days_to_standstill} days.
Standstill expiry: {days_to_standstill}d — flag any Danone 13D/A or open-market buys once it lapses.
Coalition vs ⅔: {coalition_pct}% vs {supermajority}% — a deal still needs the float; watch institutional accumulation (Citadel 5.4%).
